ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date the company went public */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being reported on */,
  "earning_date" TEXT /* Date of the earnings announcement */,
  "after_market" TEXT /* Indicates if the report was released after market hours (Y/N) */,
  "price_before" REAL /* Price of the stock before the earnings report */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* The reported revenue for the quarter */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* The earnings per share (EPS) reported */,
  "estimated_revenue" TEXT /* The estimated revenue before the report */,
  "estimated_earnings_per_share" REAL /* The estimated EPS before the report */,
  "beat_consensus" INTEGER /* Whether the actual earnings/revenue beat the consensus estimates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price movement record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earnings report for which this movement is recorded */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the earnings report date */,
  "one_day_high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the earnings report date */,
  "one_day_low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the earnings report date */,
  "volume" TEXT /* The trading volume on the earnings report date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock in pre-market trading */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock in after-market trading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_movements_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES earnings_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "closing_prices" (
  "closing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each closing price record */,
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price movement record */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the earnings report date */,
  "final_move" REAL /* Final move in price compared to the price before earnings */,
  "volume" TEXT /* The trading volume on the closing date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock in pre-market trading */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock in after-market trading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("closing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_closing_prices_movement_id FOREIGN KEY ("movement_id") REFERENCES price_movements ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expiry_details" (
  "expiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiry detail record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earnings report associated with this expiry */,
  "days_until_expiry" INTEGER /* Number of days remaining until option expiry */,
  "high_until_expiry" REAL /* Highest price recorded until the expiry date */,
  "low_until_expiry" REAL /* Lowest price recorded until the expiry date */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price of the option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* The type of option (e.g., Call, Put) */,
  "trading_volume" TEXT /* The trading volume of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expiry_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES earnings_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maximum_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maximum movement record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earnings report associated with this movement */,
  "max_move" REAL /* Maximum price movement recorded on the earnings report date */,
  "close_price_1" REAL /* Closing price at the end of the first trading day post-earnings */,
  "final_move_1" REAL /* Final move recorded on the closing price */,
  "volume" TEXT /* The trading volume on the day of maximum movement */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock in pre-market trading */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock in after-market trading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maximum_movements_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES earnings_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view report, download data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-100) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* The model or method used for the prediction */,
  "predicted_volume" TEXT /* The predicted trading volume */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* The lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* The upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock whose price is recorded */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "historical_price" REAL /* Price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "volume" TEXT /* The trading volume on the recorded date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price on the recorded date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price on the recorded date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock in pre-market trading */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock in after-market trading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "expertise_area" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the analyst */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* The number of years the analyst has been in the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the analyst account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
